jsonLd.title: FitOn is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!
